name: browserstack
description: USER LEVEL: You run cross-browser and device tests from chat—no local emulator setup or dashboard hunting for session replays. PROJECT LEVEL: CI and QA pipelines get real-device coverage and accessibility scans without maintaining your own device lab. Real browsers and devices on BrowserStack—drive Selenium, Playwright, or Appium automation, capture sessions and screenshots, debug failures, and run WCAG accessibility scans. BEST SUITED FOR: • Web apps needing cross-browser compatibility testing • Mobile teams testing on real iOS and Android devices • Projects with WCAG compliance or accessibility requirements
